name: Jungle Scout
description: Jungle Scout Public API for Amazon product research: product database queries, keyword discovery by ASIN or seed keyword, historical search volume, sales estimates, and share of voice.

credential_fields.name: key_name
credential_fields.label: Key Name
credential_fields.description: Jungle Scout API key name from the Developer page.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Jungle Scout API key. The Authorization header is KEY_NAME:API_KEY.

credential_fields.name: api_type
credential_fields.label: API Type
credential_fields.description: Use junglescout for JS accounts or cobalt for Enterprise accounts.

tools.name: query_product_database
tools.description: Search Jungle Scout's Amazon product database using product filters or ASIN/title keywords. Use this for product research, niche discovery, revenue/sales/review filters, seller type, category, and availability filters. Body must be JSON:API data with type product_database_query and attributes.

sort.description: Sort field, e.g. revenue, -revenue, sales, -sales, reviews, -reviews, name, -name.

tools.name: keywords_by_asin
tools.description: Return keywords for which the queried ASINs appear in Amazon search results. Query up to 10 ASINs at a time and filter/sort by search volume, trend, PPC bid, ranking ease, relevancy, and organic product count.

data.description: JSON:API body with type keywords_by_asin_query and attributes such as asins plus optional filters.

tools.name: keywords_by_keyword
tools.description: Return related Amazon keywords and metrics based on a seed keyword. Use this for Amazon keyword expansion, search volume, trends, PPC bids, ranking ease, relevancy, and organic product count.

data.description: JSON:API body with type keywords_by_keyword_query and attributes such as keyword plus optional filters.

tools.name: historical_search_volume
tools.description: Return exact keyword search volume in 7-day increments for a date range.

tools.name: sales_estimates
tools.description: Return daily price, rank, and sales estimate data for an ASIN over a period. Variant ASINs return parent-ASIN aggregate estimates.

end_date.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD. Must be before current date.

tools.name: share_of_voice
tools.description: For a keyword search on Amazon, return brand share across the first 3 result pages, including organic, sponsored, combined share of voice, PPC bid, 30-day search volume, and top-ASIN conversion-rate data.
